violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front service area was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

A bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Bucket was removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator; raw chicken and beef were stored over cheese in the cold drawers. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the service area prep tables have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
A leak was observed at the drain of the 3-bay sink. The air gap is not aligned properly resulting in a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry in a manner that prevents potential contamination of the premises after use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The door to the walk-in is in poor repair, observed with a crack at the hinge. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The thermometer for the walk-in refrigerator is in poor repair, not accurately reading ambient air temperature. Establishment must place a thermometer within unit prior to opening. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2024

Beverages and oil were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in storage and a bucket was observed on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Sanitizer dispenser unit not dispensing sanitizer as evidenced by test strip reading of 0ppm. Inspector observed that the lines were not connected to sanitizer solution due to the bottle type not appropriate for the dispenser. 3-bay sink was set-up to proper concentration by manually dispensing sanitizer solution. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The floor near the beverage cooler was observed with cardboard taped to the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
